title: Guettardella attenuata
taxonomy: Guettardella attenuata is classified within the family Boraginaceae. This family includes a diverse range of flowering plants commonly known as borage or forget-me-nots. Guettardella attenuata, in particular, belongs to the genus Guettardella, which contains a limited number of species primarily found in Australia. The species Guettardella attenuata is native to Western Australia, where it thrives in a variety of habitats. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Boraginaceae family.
